positive: A highly detailed, stylized vintage exploration map featuring a stylized, fantastical mountain range silhouetted against a bright sky. The map elements include hand-drawn celestial constellations, stylized deep-sea kraken tentacles subtly wrapping around the mountain range, and compass roses. The overall aesthetic should mimic aged, richly textured parchment mixed with vibrant, deep indigo and burnt orange watercolor washes. Use strong linework, clean vectors, and a central, symmetrical composition suitable for a repeating print pattern on apparel. Composition should emphasize clean silhouettes and high contrast between the dark ink lines and the aged paper background. Studio lighting, concept art style, ultra-detailed, high saturation, perfect symmetry, designed for apparel print.
negative: blurry, artifact, noise, watermark, text, logo, signature, copyright, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, low contrast, grayscale, monochrome, extra limbs, cropped, jpeg artifacts, distracting elements
